evals.expected_output: A drift report scanning README, SKILL.md files, and any docs/ directory against actual code
assertions: Output mentions scanning local documentation files
Output checks at least some SKILL.md files in .cursor/skills/
Output reports findings organized by severity (critical, stale, minor) or states docs are current
Output offers to fix any issues found in local files
No HTML files or artifacts are generated

evals.expected_output: Focused drift report on skill descriptions vs actual skill behavior
assertions: Output focuses specifically on SKILL.md files, not all documentation
Output checks whether skill descriptions match what the skills actually do
Output identifies any skills with broken or misleading descriptions
